description: Bug F regression (codex-found 2026-05-29, FIXED): send the SAME text twice in rapid succession (within the 2s content-dedup window). Both must persist as two distinct self rows. The fix makes appendHistory content-dedup run only for inbound messages, so self-sends with unique sequenced msgIDs are kept distinct. Hermetic — asserts only on self rows, no echo peer needed. #18: the duplicate text carries a per-run {{nonce}}; the SAME token in BOTH send steps resolves to the SAME string, so the pair stays BYTE-IDENTICAL within the run (preserving the Bug-F condition) while being unique across runs. PROMOTED to a HARD GATE 2026-05-30: measured 20/20 back-to-back PASS on the nonce build (hermetic/deterministic), so nonBlocking was removed.
